The '''''Lifeline''''' was a [[Corellia/Legends|Corellian]] [[YT-1300 light freighter/Legends|YT-1300 light freighter]] owned by [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] [[Dannen Lifehold]].

==Appearances==
*{{JournalCite|1|Breaking Free: The Adventures of Dannen Lifehold}} {{1st}}
*{{JournalCite|3|Changing the Odds: The Adventures of Dannen Lifehold|reprint=1}}
